title: Fast Developing Bonus Chest
description: Get a richer bonus chest to start.
body:
You want to start a new adventure. So you create new world, then punch trees, then craft wooden pickaxe, then mine... Don't you think it's too annoying?

This data pack can provide you with a richer bonus chest to have a more free beginning. You can get more basic items such as logs, planks, cobblestones, and iron ingots.

The variant of wood you get will change with the biome. If there's no wood, you won't get any wood. But if you're in some inhospitable biomes, you'll get extra items.

In addition, when you open the bonus chest, you will gain 65 experience points and receive all advancements up to "Acquire Hardware".
